source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for multilingual headings, body text, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Dense transparent analytics grids, 8px component radius, glass-panel cards, leaf-vein dividers, stream-neutral spacing, and crisp cloud-forest dashboard hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent glass frog motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create a single glass frog body as an isolated natural-history cutout, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: one complete glass frog, dorsal/three-quarter view, translucent lime leaf-green skin, visible pale internal silhouette through the belly and limbs, delicate gold-green eyes, thin dark toe pads, subtle cloud-forest stream moisture highlights, accurate amphibian anatomy.
Composition/framing: centered full body with generous padding; all toes visible; no cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves translucent skin, glassy membrane edges, and fine natural detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no leaf, no branch, no stream background, no second frog, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Glass Frog".
Reference use: Use the visible glass frog cutout as the motif reference. Extract palette, translucency, contrast, spacing mood, texture rhythm, and interaction language from the glass frog body in a cloud forest stream.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 composition, high-resolution design board intended for 3840x2160 delivery.
Core theme: transparent analytics system derived from a glass frog body. Use translucent lime leaf green, soft chartreuse, glassy pale belly, gold eye detail, wet membrane highlights, stream mist neutrals, moss ink, and slate-river lines. The system must have enough contrast for readable product UI.
Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Glass Frog, Glass Frog, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
UI coverage: left sidebar navigation, top command/search, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut/status chart, data table rows, filters, form fields, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, buttons, cards, loading, empty, error, token swatches, spacing/radius/shadow samples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with labels Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board, precise grid, 8px radius, translucent frosted surfaces, glass-panel overlays, leaf-vein dividers, stream-neutral background, crisp readable text, realistic UI mockup.
Text constraints: use short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs; no random brand names; no watermark. Spell exactly "Morphous Glass Frog".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the same Morphous theme named "Morphous Glass Frog". It must feel like the same transparent analytics system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible glass frog cutout and visible light-mode Morphous Glass Frog board as references. Preserve the translucent lime, leaf green, chartreuse, glass belly, stream slate, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 composition, high-resolution design board intended for 3840x2160 delivery.
Core theme: dark cloud forest stream analytics UI derived from a glass frog body. Use moss ink and deep forest glass backgrounds, readable river-mist text, translucent lime leaf-green primary, chartreuse signal, pale glass-belly surfaces, muted stream slate, and wet membrane highlights. Keep contrast strong and labels readable.
Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Glass Frog, Glass Frog, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
UI coverage: left sidebar navigation, top command/search, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut/status chart, data table rows, filters, form fields, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, buttons, cards, loading, empty, error, token swatches, spacing/radius/shadow samples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with labels Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board, precise grid, 8px radius, translucent frosted dark surfaces, glass-panel overlays, leaf-vein dividers, subtle stream reflections, crisp readable text, realistic UI mockup.
Text constraints: use short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs; no random brand names; no watermark. Spell exactly "Morphous Glass Frog".
